scope.title: What our service covers
scope.exclude1: Life-threatening emergencies (heart attack, stroke, severe trauma)

bookingFaq.title: Questions before you confirm
bookingFaq.q1: What if it's a serious emergency?
bookingFaq.a1: For life-threatening emergencies (loss of consciousness, severe chest pain, major bleeding, stroke, trauma), call 112 directly. OnCall Clinic does not handle life-threatening emergencies.
bookingFaq.a2: Free before the doctor accepts (100% refund). 50% if you cancel 2-24h before the visit. 0% if the doctor is on the way.
bookingFaq.q3: What if no doctor is available?
bookingFaq.a3: If we can't find a doctor within a reasonable time, you get an automatic full refund.
bookingFaq.a4: Yes. All our doctors are bilingual ES/EN. Some also speak German, French or Dutch.
bookingFaq.a5: Yes. Doctors are licensed in Spain and hold valid professional liability insurance. OnCall Clinic operates as an authorised technology intermediary.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to what patients ask most
faq.q1: How long does it take for the doctor to arrive?
faq.a1: From 1 hour after confirmation, depending on availability and location. The exact time is shown when a doctor accepts your request.
faq.a2: Currently home-visit general medicine consultations. Coming soon: paediatrics, physiotherapy and nursing.
faq.a3: By card through our secure platform (Stripe). Payment is processed when the booking is confirmed.
faq.a4: Yes. Free cancellation (100% refund) if you cancel before a doctor accepts. After: 50% if cancelled 2-24h in advance; 0% with less than 2h.
faq.a5: Yes, all doctors are licensed in Spain, hold valid professional liability insurance and are registered as self-employed (RETA).
faq.a6: No. For life-threatening emergencies, call 112. OnCall Clinic is for non-urgent medical consultations.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions of Use
terms.s1p1: OnCall Clinic (hereinafter, the "Platform") is operated by Ibiza Care SL (CIF: B19973569, registered office in Ibiza, Balearic Islands) and constitutes a digital marketplace connecting patients with licensed healthcare professionals for the provision of home medical services on the island of Ibiza.
terms.s1p2: Access to and use of the Platform implies full acceptance of these Terms and Conditions in accordance with Spanish Law 34/2002 on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE).
terms.s2p1: Ibiza Care SL acts exclusively as a technology intermediary pursuant to Article 1544 of the Spanish Civil Code. It does NOT provide medical or healthcare services of any kind. The care relationship is established directly between the patient and the healthcare professional.
terms.s2p2: Doctors operating through the Platform are self-employed professionals, duly registered with the corresponding Spanish Medical Association, holding valid professional liability insurance and registered with RETA (Spanish self-employment regime).
terms.s3p1: To use the Platform, users must:
terms.s3li1: Be at least 18 years of age or have legal guardian authorisation
terms.s3li3: Have a valid payment method (credit/debit card)
terms.s3li4: Accept the privacy policy and provide the required consents
terms.s4p1: The patient requests a consultation by indicating their location, type of service and symptoms. The Platform searches for an available doctor and, once accepted, the patient receives confirmation with the professional's details and real-time tracking. Acceptance by the doctor constitutes a binding commitment to attend the specified address.
terms.s5p1: Payments are processed through Stripe Connect. The total price is charged to the patient upon completion of the consultation. The Platform retains an intermediation fee detailed in the doctor contract; the remainder is transferred directly to the doctor's account.
terms.s5p2: Prices are displayed in euros (€), VAT included where applicable, in accordance with Royal Legislative Decree 1/2007 (LGDCU). The patient will receive a payment receipt by email.
terms.s6p1: Cancellations are governed by the following timeframes:
terms.s6li3: Less than 2 hours before: no refund (0%)
terms.s7p1: Each doctor assumes full clinical responsibility for the care provided and must hold professional liability insurance with minimum coverage of €1,000,000. Ibiza Care SL, as an intermediary, assumes no responsibility for the quality, suitability or outcome of medical acts performed.
terms.s7p2: Ibiza Care SL shall not be liable for damages arising from service interruptions, technical failures or force majeure, in accordance with Balearic Islands Consumer Protection Law 7/2014.
terms.s8p1: The processing of personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy, accessible from this legal section, in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and Spanish Organic Law 3/2018 (LOPDGDD).
terms.s9p1: All Platform content (code, design, text, logos, trademarks) is the property of Ibiza Care SL or its licensors and is protected by applicable intellectual and industrial property legislation. Reproduction without express authorisation is prohibited.
terms.s10p1: These Terms are governed by Spanish law. For any dispute arising from the use of the Platform, the parties submit to the Courts and Tribunals of Ibiza, waiving any other jurisdiction that may apply, except where consumer regulations establish a different jurisdiction.

withdrawal.title: 11. Right of withdrawal
withdrawal.intro: As a consumer, you have the right of withdrawal recognised in Articles 71 et seq. of Royal Legislative Decree 1/2007, of 16 November (LGDCU):
withdrawal.period: Term: 14 calendar days from contracting the service, without need for justification.
withdrawal.exception: Legal exception (Art. 103.a LGDCU): the right of withdrawal does NOT apply when the service has been fully performed or when its performance has begun with the consumer's express consent.
withdrawal.practice: In practice: 100% refund if you cancel BEFORE a doctor accepts your request. Once accepted and with express consent to start, the service is considered in performance and the right of withdrawal no longer applies.
withdrawal.howTo: To exercise the right of withdrawal within the applicable term and scenarios, send an email to dpo@oncall.clinic using the model form below.
withdrawal.formContent:
To: Ibiza Care SLU — C/ Lugo 11, 3º2ª, 07830 Sant Josep de Sa Talaia, Illes Balears — dpo@oncall.clinic

I/We hereby give notice that I/we withdraw from my/our contract for the provision of the following service: [service description]

Ordered on: [date]
Received on: [date]
Consumer's name: [full name]
Consumer's address: [address]
Consumer's signature (only if paper): [signature]
Date: [date]

odr.title: 12. Online Dispute Resolution (ODR) and complaint forms
odr.content: Pursuant to EU Regulation 524/2013, you may submit complaints through the European Commission's ODR platform at

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This cookie policy explains which cookies are used by the OnCall Clinic Platform, operated by Ibiza Care SL, in accordance with Article 22.2 of Spanish Law 34/2002 (LSSI-CE) and Articles 6 and 7 of Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR).
cookies.whatDesc: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They allow us to remember your preferences, keep your session active and analyse how the service is used.
cookies.noMarketing: We do not use marketing or advertising cookies in the current version of the Platform.
cookies.manageDesc: You can accept or reject optional cookies from the banner that appears on your first visit. You can also change your cookie settings at any time from your browser settings. Please note that disabling technical cookies may affect the functionality of the service.
cookies.legalDesc: Technical cookies are installed on the basis of the controller's legitimate interest (Art. 6.1.f GDPR) as they are necessary for the Platform to function. Analytics cookies are only activated with your prior consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR), in accordance with Art. 22.2 LSSI-CE.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.lopdgddIntro: In accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and Spanish Organic Law 3/2018 of 5 December on Personal Data Protection and Digital Rights Guarantee (LOPDGDD), we inform you about the processing of your personal data through the OnCall Clinic platform.
privacy.s2Title: 2. Purposes and legal basis for processing
privacy.purpose1Desc: Create and maintain your account, authentication, service communications.
privacy.purpose1Legal: Legal basis: Performance of a contract (Art. 6.1.b GDPR)
privacy.purpose2Desc: Connect you with available doctors, manage bookings, real-time GPS tracking.
privacy.purpose2Legal: Legal basis: Performance of a contract (Art. 6.1.b GDPR)
privacy.purpose3Desc: Charges, refunds and transfers to doctors via Stripe Connect.
privacy.purpose3Legal: Legal basis: Performance of a contract (Art. 6.1.b GDPR) + Legal tax obligation (Art. 6.1.c GDPR)
privacy.purpose4Legal: Legal basis: Consent of the data subject (Art. 6.1.a GDPR)
privacy.purpose5Desc: Anonymous usage statistics, error detection, experience optimisation.
privacy.purpose6Title: 🩺 Clinical data generated during the consultation
privacy.purpose6Desc: OnCall Clinic SL is a technology intermediary (LSSI-CE / e-Commerce Directive) and does NOT process health data (Art. 9 GDPR). The licensed doctor who carries out the in-person visit is the independent data controller for any clinical data generated during the consultation (anamnesis, diagnosis, prescription). To exercise your rights over that data, contact the doctor who attended you directly.
privacy.purpose6Legal: Data controller for clinical data: the doctor (not OnCall). Doctor's legal basis: Art. 9.2.h GDPR (healthcare provision).
privacy.s4Intro: In accordance with Articles 15 to 22 of the GDPR, you have the right to:
privacy.s4Contact: To exercise your rights, contact our DPO: dpo@oncall.clinic
privacy.s4Aepd: You also have the right to file a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD): www.aepd.es
privacy.retention1: Clinical data: 5 years from the last consultation (Law 41/2002 on Patient Autonomy)
privacy.retention2: Account data: 3 years after account closure
privacy.retention3: Payment and billing data: 5 years (tax obligation)
privacy.s6Content: We use Stripe Inc. (USA) as our payment processor, protected under the European Commission's Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs, Art. 46 GDPR) and the EU-US Data Privacy Framework. No other international transfers of personal data are made.

automatedDecisions.title: 6bis. Automated decisions (Art. 22 GDPR)
automatedDecisions.content: We do not take decisions based solely on automated processing that produce legal effects or significantly affect the data subject. The assignment of healthcare professionals to a request is based on objective technical criteria (geographic proximity, declared availability, requested language) and admits human intervention by the support team at any time.

dpia.title: 7. Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA)
dpia.intro: In accordance with Article 35 GDPR, Ibiza Care SL has conducted a Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA) for the large-scale processing of health data, given the special sensitivity of these data (Art. 9 GDPR).
dpia.m1: Encryption in transit: TLS 1.3 across all communications between client, server and database.
dpia.m2: Encryption at rest: AES-256 in the database (Supabase/PostgreSQL) and document storage.
dpia.m3: Role-based access control (Row Level Security in Supabase): patients access only their own data; doctors only assigned consultations; admin with differentiated privileges.
dpia.m4: Pseudonymisation: internal identifiers (UUIDs) decoupled from directly identifiable data in analytical queries.
dpia.m5: Periodic audits: immutable ledgers (consent_log, payout_audit_log) with timestamp, IP and user-agent.
dpia.m6: Continuous staff training on data protection and medical confidentiality.
dpia.m7: Prior documentary verification of licensing, liability insurance and self-employed (RETA) registration before activating any healthcare professional.
dpia.m8: Effective erasure (Art. 17 GDPR) via FK-safe cascade when the right to erasure is exercised.
dpia.aepd: The full DPIA report is available to the Spanish Data Protection Authority (AEPD) upon reasoned request.
dpia.contact: For any matter relating to this assessment, contact our DPO at dpo@oncall.clinic.

privacy.managePrefs: Manage your privacy preferences from your panel:

avisoLegal.title: Legal Notice
avisoLegal.s1p1: In compliance with the disclosure duty of article 10 of Law 34/2002 of 11 July on Information Society and Electronic Commerce Services (LSSI-CE), we provide the following information:
avisoLegal.s2p1: OnCall Clinic is an intermediary platform between patients and licensed healthcare professionals. We do not provide medical services directly; we facilitate the contractual engagement between parties, manage payments and provide communication and tracking tools.
avisoLegal.s3p1: Access and use of the website implies acceptance of the general terms of use published in the Terms & Conditions section. Users commit to a diligent use of the platform and to refraining from any activity contrary to law, morals or public order.
avisoLegal.s4p1: All content on the website (text, images, trademarks, logos, source code, databases and design) is the property of Ibiza Care SL or its licensors, protected under Spanish and international intellectual and industrial property law.
avisoLegal.s5p1: These terms are governed by Spanish law. Any dispute arising from the use of the website shall be submitted to the Courts and Tribunals of Eivissa (Balearic Islands), with express waiver of any other forum that may correspond to the parties.

identification.title: 1. Provider identification (Art. 10 LSSI-CE)
identification.intro: In compliance with the disclosure duty of Article 10 of Law 34/2002 of 11 July, on Information Society and Electronic Commerce Services (LSSI-CE), the following identifying information is provided for the owner of the website oncall.clinic:
identification.cnaeDesc: Healthcare activities: technology intermediation in home-visit medical services

purpose.title: 2. Purpose and nature of the service
purpose.warning: OnCall Clinic is NOT a healthcare facility or healthcare provider. It acts exclusively as a technology intermediary connecting patients with independent, licensed healthcare professionals.
purpose.p1: Ibiza Care SLU operates the OnCall Clinic technology platform, whose purpose is to facilitate direct contracting between patients and independent healthcare professionals who are duly licensed and hold valid professional liability insurance.
purpose.p2: The contractual relationship for the provision of medical services is established DIRECTLY between the patient and the healthcare professional. Ibiza Care SLU is not a party to that contract, but rather the provider of a neutral technology intermediation tool (booking, geolocation, communication, secure payment and tracking).
purpose.p3: Clinical, diagnostic, therapeutic and medical confidentiality responsibility lies exclusively with each healthcare professional, who acts under their own licensing, self-employed social-security registration (RETA) and professional liability policy.

conditions.title: 3. General terms of use
conditions.p1: Access, browsing and use of the Platform imply express and full acceptance of these terms, as well as of the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy published on the website.
conditions.l1: Provide accurate, up-to-date and complete information in the registration process and when requesting services.
conditions.l2: Use the Platform diligently in accordance with the law, good customs and public order, refraining from any illegal, fraudulent activity or activity that harms the rights of third parties.
conditions.l3: Not introduce, store or disseminate through the Platform any virus, malicious code or content contrary to current legislation (intellectual property, honour, privacy, data protection, advertising, consumer law, etc.).

intellectualProperty.title: 4. Intellectual and industrial property
intellectualProperty.p1: All website content (source code, design, texts, images, trademarks, logos, databases, interfaces, structure, navigation and audiovisual material) is owned by Ibiza Care SLU or its licensors, protected by Royal Legislative Decree 1/1996 of 12 April (Intellectual Property Act) and applicable national and international regulations.
intellectualProperty.p2: Reproduction, distribution, public communication, transformation or any other form of exploitation, in whole or in part, is expressly prohibited without prior written authorisation from Ibiza Care SLU or the respective rights holders.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of liability
liability.clinicalWarning: Ibiza Care SLU is NOT liable for clinical acts, diagnoses, prescriptions, treatments or any medical decisions made by the healthcare professionals. Such liability falls integrally and exclusively on each professional, covered by their professional liability insurance.
liability.p1: Ibiza Care SLU acts solely as a technology intermediary and information-society service provider under Article 16 LSSI-CE. It does not edit, select, moderate or pre-screen the clinical content generated by the professionals.
liability.p2: Notwithstanding the above, Ibiza Care SLU guarantees documentary verification of licensing, liability insurance policy and RETA (self-employed) registration of the professionals operating on the Platform, prior to their activation.

dataProtection.title: 6. Personal data protection
dataProtection.p1: The processing of personal data collected through the website is governed by the Privacy Policy available at

jurisdiction.title: 7. Applicable law and jurisdiction

For the resolution of any dispute arising from access to or use of the website, the parties submit to the Courts and Tribunals of Eivissa (Balearic Islands), with express waiver of any other forum that may correspond to them, except where consumer protection regulations establish a different mandatory forum for the consumer.

about.title: OnCall Clinic
about.intro: Medical services intermediary platform for home visits in Ibiza. We connect patients with licensed doctors for in-person consultations at hotels, villas and residences. We are in alpha — thanks for trying the service.
about.wip: Page under construction. More information coming soon.

consent.geolocation: I authorise the use of my geolocation to match me with the nearest doctor.
consent.analytics: I accept cookies and analytics tools to improve the service.

hero.subtitle: Licensed doctor at your hotel, villa or home. From {hours}.

how.title: Three steps. No paperwork.
how.subtitle: From booking to diagnosis in under 90 minutes.

steps.title: Tell us where you are
steps.body: Hotel, villa, boat or home. Pin on the map or address. Multilingual support: ES · EN · DE · FR.

steps.title: The doctor arrives
steps.body: COMIB-licensed doctor at your door in ~1 hour. Full exam, diagnosis and treatment.

steps.title: Prescription and follow-up
steps.body: Digital prescription, insurance receipt and chat follow-up. No queues. No paperwork.

includes.title: What our service includes
includes.subtitle: Total transparency. This yes, this no.
noItems: Vital emergencies (heart attack, stroke, severe trauma)

items.name: Sarah & Tom
items.where: Hotel Aguas de Ibiza · Santa Eulària
items.quote: Our 4-year-old spiked a fever at 11 pm. Doctor at the hotel in 50 minutes. Calm, kind, spoke perfect English.

items.name: Markus K.
items.quote: Booking auf Deutsch, Rezept digital, Rechnung für die Versicherung sofort per Mail. Hervorragend.

items.name: Camille L.
items.quote: Otite de mon fils un dimanche soir. Médecin sur place en 45 minutes. Service vraiment rassurant.

items.name: James R.
items.quote: Doc came to the boat. Stomach bug sorted, prescription delivered to pharmacy. Saved our trip.

faq.title: What guests ask us
faq.subtitle: If you don't find your answer, message us on WhatsApp 24/7.

items.q: How long until the doctor arrives?
items.a: Average in Ibiza: 55 minutes. We guarantee a max of 90 minutes in urban zones (Ibiza city, Santa Eulària, San Antonio, San José). Rural zones may take a bit longer.

items.q: How much does a visit cost?
items.a: Standard rate €129 daytime (08:00–22:00) and €169 at night or on holidays. Includes the visit, diagnosis, basic treatment, digital prescription and insurance receipt. Secure payment via Stripe — Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay and Google Pay.
All our doctors speak Spanish and English. Most also speak German or French. Tell us your language when booking and we'll match a compatible doctor.

items.q: Does it work with my travel insurance?
items.a: Yes. After the visit you'll receive by email a detailed medical receipt and the invoice, valid for reimbursement with most travel insurance providers (Allianz, AXA, ERV, Mapfre, etc.).

items.q: Do you see children and babies?
items.a: Yes. Our doctors are trained in general paediatrics — fever, ear infection, gastroenteritis, rashes. For severe paediatric emergencies, call 112.

items.q: Do you cover the whole island?
items.a: Yes, all of Ibiza: city, Santa Eulària, San Antonio, San José, Sant Joan, Es Canar, Cala Llonga, Playa d'en Bossa, and more. We also visit villas, boats and yachts in marinas.

items.q: What if I need a hospital?
items.a: If your case needs admission, imaging or surgery, the doctor will refer you to the right hospital (Can Misses, Policlínica Nuestra Señora del Rosario) and coordinate your transfer.
Yes. We arrive without visible uniforms or branded vehicles. Total privacy — something especially valued by our guests at villas and yachts.

meta.title: Join OnCall Clinic as a Doctor | Earn on Your Schedule
meta.description: Join OnCall Clinic: set your own price, choose your hours, get paid in 2 days. Licensed doctors across Spain earn €675-4,050/month with home visits. No exclusivity. 10% commission all-inclusive.

hero.title: Your expertise. Your schedule. Your patients.
hero.subtitle: Join the network of licensed doctors providing home visits across Spain. Set your own price, choose when you work, get paid in 2 days.

benefits.title: Built for doctors who decide
benefits.subtitle: No assigned shifts. No monthly fees. You control your calendar and your rates.

items.title: Your price
items.desc: You set the home-visit fee. OnCall only handles payment and logistics.

items.title: Your schedule
items.desc: Toggle availability anytime. You only receive requests while you're online.

items.title: Paid in 2 days
items.desc: Stripe Connect transfers your share directly to your bank account after each completed visit.

items.title: International patients
items.desc: Hotel and villa visits — higher tickets and patients used to digital payment.

items.title: Zero exclusivity
items.desc: Keep working wherever you want: public health, private practice, another platform. No minimum dedication required.

items.title: We handle the rest
items.desc: Patient acquisition, payments, receipts, support and compliance. You focus on the medicine.

income.title: Estimate your monthly earnings
income.subtitle: Drag the slider to set your activity level. Base fee €150/visit, OnCall commission 10% in year 1 (all-inclusive: VAT + Stripe).
income.commissionNote: Includes VAT and Stripe fees. You pay nothing else.
income.yearTwo: Year 2 onwards: 15% commission all-inclusive (€127.50 net per visit).
income.monthlyNote: Work the hours you choose. No targets. No retention.
income.sliderHint: Drag to see your monthly income.

process.title: From sign-up to first consultation in under a week
process.subtitle: 5 simple steps. Licensure verification is on us.

steps.title: Create your account
steps.desc: Email + license number. Automatic verification with COMIB / your local medical board.

steps.title: Complete your profile
steps.desc: Bio, specialty, languages, photo and consultation price. Patients see this before choosing.

steps.title: Professional verification
steps.desc: We confirm your license, professional liability insurance and self-employed registration. Email when active.

steps.title: Connect Stripe
steps.desc: Link your bank account via Stripe Connect. Standard KYC — IBAN + ID.

steps.title: Go live
steps.desc: Tap “Available now” when you can take visits. First request arrives instantly.

requirements.title: What you need to start
requirements.subtitle: If you already practice private medicine in Spain, you most likely have everything.

items.title: Active medical license
items.desc: Active license number with any official medical board in Spain.

items.title: Professional Liability Insurance
items.desc: Up-to-date professional liability policy. We can help if you need to get one.

items.title: Self-employed status (RETA) or company
items.desc: Registered as autónomo or working through a medical company. Required for invoicing.

items.title: Smartphone with data
items.desc: iPhone or Android to receive requests and share location during the visit.

items.title: Bilingual ES/EN
items.desc: Ability to provide care in English (tourists) plus Spanish. Other languages are a plus.

items.title: Basic medical bag
items.desc: Sphygmomanometer, stethoscope, otoscope and exam supplies. No heavy equipment.

cities.title: Where we're launching
cities.subtitle: Ibiza is live. Mallorca, Madrid and Barcelona queued for 2026. 6 more cities in 2027.

questions.q: What is OnCall's commission per visit?
questions.a: 10% during your first year after activation, 15% from year 2 onwards. The commission is all-inclusive — it covers VAT and Stripe fees. You pay nothing else. On a €150 visit you net €135 to your bank in year 1 (€127.50 from year 2).

Stripe Connect automatically transfers your share (visit total minus commission) to your IBAN within 24-48 hours after you mark the visit as completed. No monthly aggregation, no retention on our side.

questions.q: Do I have to accept every request?
questions.a: No. You only receive requests when “Available now” is on. The patient picks you before paying — if you don't want to go out, you don't appear. Once you accept, the visit can't be cancelled without cost except for legitimate cause.
None. Keep working in the public system, in another private clinic, on another platform — wherever you want. OnCall doesn't require minimum dedication or stop you from seeing patients off-app.

questions.q: Who is responsible for clinical care?
questions.a: You, as the licensed doctor, are the independent data controller for clinical treatment during the visit (Art. 9.2.h GDPR). OnCall Clinic is a technology intermediary — it doesn't handle health data or interfere with clinical decisions.

Ibiza is live. We're recruiting in Madrid, Barcelona, Valencia, Sevilla, Málaga, Bilbao, Palma, Alicante, San Sebastián and Tenerife (10 cities total). Each city goes live when we reach a critical mass of doctors.

questions.q: What if there's an emergency or complication during the visit?
questions.a: As in any private medical act, you follow standard clinical protocols and, if needed, escalate to 112 / hospital emergency. Your professional liability insurance covers the medical act. OnCall doesn't interfere with clinical decisions.

questions.q: How do you block my schedule while I'm on another consultation?
questions.a: While your availability is on and you haven't marked a visit as completed, OnCall does not auto-assign a second consultation to you. You can also toggle availability off manually from the dashboard if you need a break between visits. Assignment is always explicit confirmation on your side — never auto-accept.

cta.title: Start receiving patients this week
cta.subtitle: Register in 5 minutes. License verification in 3-5 days. Zero onboarding cost.

footer.intermediary: OnCall Clinic is a technology intermediary. It does not provide medical services directly.
